input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, body: .body}' && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36" --jq '{state: .state, requested_reviewers: [.requested_reviewers[].login], review_comments: .review_comments, comments: .comments}'
input.description: Check issue comments and PR metadata

input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36" --jq '{title: .title, body: .body}'

content.content:
{"body":"## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean

Run: 20260403-1806-d904","title":"feat: add Overseerr request detail, deletion, and retry"}

input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/reviews" --jq '.[] | select(.user.login != "gemini-code-assist[bot]") | {user: .user.login, state: .state, body: .body}'

content.text:
There are no review comments from a human reviewer on PR #36. The only review is from the Gemini Code Assist bot, which stated "I have no feedback to provide." There are also no issue comments or inline review comments.

The PR appears to have no actionable feedback to address. The bot review approved the changes without suggestions.
